creator: nixd0rf@goja.nl.eu.org
text:
Hello Mina

It's getting weirder. 

In order to generate a patch I decided to install inn by using the ports, instead of pkg using pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD:13:amd64/latest. By using the ports it runs okay! I did not patch Makefile yet.

Using the pkg version I see an endless stream of
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39095]: ME starting at Thu Sep 07 17:09:01 2023 (INN 2.7.1)
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39095]: loading /usr/local/news/etc/innfeed.conf
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39095]: ME config file error: line 27: syntax error
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! exit 1 elapsed 0 pid 39095
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed!:25:proc:39095 closed
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! spawned innfeed!:25:proc:39274
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! restarted
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39274]: ME starting at Thu Sep 07 17:09:01 2023 (INN 2.7.1)
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39274]: loading /usr/local/news/etc/innfeed.conf
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39274]: ME config file error: line 27: syntax error
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! exit 1 elapsed 0 pid 39274
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed!:25:proc:39274 closed
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! spawned innfeed!:27:proc:39345
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! restarted
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39345]: ME starting at Thu Sep 07 17:09:01 2023 (INN 2.7.1)
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39345]: loading /usr/local/news/etc/innfeed.conf
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innfeed[39345]: ME config file error: line 27: syntax error
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! exit 1 elapsed 0 pid 39345
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed!:27:proc:39345 closed
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! spawned innfeed!:27:proc:39658
Sep  7 17:09:01 goja innd[25853]: innfeed! restarted

Line 27 reads
pid-file:                       innfeed.pid

When i comment that out, it picks the #28, etc etc etc. Linenumbers 1 to 26 are commented out. The same innfeed.conf works as intended before my pkg upgrade yesterday. And also works when I installed the one I just build from using make install in /usr/ports/news/inn. I checked out ports using git couple of minutes ago.

I cannot feed outbound, nothing is sent. Usenet messages posted locally stay local. No peers get anything from me.

I am on amd64 / 13.2-RELEASE-p2 both userland and kernel. Inn version inn-2.7.1_1.

What more information do you need or want me to test?

Besides: thank you for your time so far.
